verbs.description: # Account Management The system [V: shall] allow users to register a new account with username , password , and initial balance .
# [ARGM-PRD: Account Management] [ARG0: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: allow] [ARG1: users to register a new account with username , password , and initial balance] .
# Account Management The system shall allow [ARG0: users] to [V: register] [ARG1: a new account with username , password , and initial balance] .
The system [V: shall] allow users to login with username and password .
[ARG0: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: allow] [ARG1: users to login with username and password] .
The system shall allow [ARG0: users] to [V: login] [ARG1: with username and password] .
The system [V: shall] allow users to logout .
[ARG0: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: allow] [ARG1: users to logout] .
The system shall allow [ARG0: users] to [V: logout] .
The system [V: shall] allow users to view users 's account profile including personal information and balance .
[ARG0: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: allow] [ARG1: users to view users 's account profile including personal information and balance] .
The system shall allow [ARG0: users] to [V: view] [ARG1: users 's account profile] [ARG2: including personal information and balance] .
The system shall allow users to view [ARG2: users 's account profile] [V: including] [ARG1: personal information and balance] .
The system [V: shall] allow users to update users 's account profile .
[ARG0: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: allow] [ARG1: users to update users 's account profile] .
The system shall allow [ARG0: users] to [V: update] [ARG1: users 's account profile] .
The system [V: shall] display the account balance and open orders for a loggedIn user .
[ARG2: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: display] [ARG1: the account balance and open orders for a loggedIn user] .
# Portfolio Management The system [V: shall] allow users to view users 's portfolio of stock holdings .
# [ARGM-ADV: Portfolio Management] [ARG0: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: allow] [ARG1: users to view users 's portfolio of stock holdings] .
# Portfolio Management The system shall allow [ARG0: users] to [V: view] [ARG1: users 's portfolio of stock holdings] .
The system [V: shall] display each holding with quantity , purchase price , and current value .
[ARG0: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: display] [ARG1: each holding] [ARG2: with quantity , purchase price , and current value] .
The system shall display [ARG0: each] [V: holding] [ARGM-MNR: with quantity , purchase price , and current value] .
The system [V: shall] calculate and display the total gain or loss for each holding .
[ARG0: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: calculate] and display [ARG1: the total gain or loss for each holding] .
[ARG0: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] calculate and [V: display] [ARG1: the total gain or loss for each holding] .
The system shall calculate and display the total gain or loss for each [V: holding] .
The system [V: shall] display the total portfolio value for a loggedIn user .
[ARG2: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: display] [ARG1: the total portfolio value for a loggedIn user] .
# Quote / Market Data The system [V: shall] allow users to look up the current price of a stock by symbol .
# [ARGM-ADV: Quote / Market Data] [ARG0: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: allow] [ARG1: users to look up the current price of a stock by symbol] .
# Quote / Market Data The system shall allow [ARG0: users] to [V: look] up [ARG1: the current price of a stock] [ARGM-MNR: by symbol] .
The system [V: shall] display stock information including symbol , company name , open price , volume , and current price .
[ARG2: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: display] [ARG1: stock information including symbol , company name , open price , volume , and current price] .
The system shall display [ARG2: stock information] [V: including] [ARG1: symbol , company name , open price , volume , and current price] .
The system [V: shall] display a market summary with top gainers and losers .
[ARG0: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: display] [ARG1: a market summary with top gainers and losers] .
The system [V: shall] update stock prices to reflect simulated market activity .
[ARG0: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: update] [ARG1: stock prices] [ARGM-PNC: to reflect simulated market activity] .
The system shall update [ARG2: stock prices] to [V: reflect] [ARG1: simulated market activity] .
# Trading The system [V: shall] allow users to buy shares of a stock by specifying symbol and quantity .
# Trading [ARG0: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: allow] [ARG1: users to buy shares of a stock by specifying symbol and quantity] .
# Trading The system shall allow [ARG0: users] to [V: buy] [ARG1: shares of a stock] [ARGM-MNR: by specifying symbol and quantity] .
# Trading The system shall allow [ARG0: users] to buy shares of a stock by [V: specifying] [ARG1: symbol and quantity] .
The system [V: shall] allow users to sell shares of a stock from users 's portfolio .
[ARG0: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: allow] [ARG1: users to sell shares of a stock from users 's portfolio] .
The system shall allow [ARG0: users] to [V: sell] [ARG1: shares of a stock from users 's portfolio] .
The system [V: shall] create an order record for each buy or sell transaction .
[ARG0: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: create] [ARG1: an order record for each buy or sell transaction] .
The system shall create an order record for each buy or [V: sell] transaction .
The system [V: shall] update the account balance when an order is completed .
[ARG0: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: update] [ARG1: the account balance] [ARGM-TMP: when an order is completed] .
The system shall update the account balance when an order [V: is] completed .
The system shall update the account balance [ARGM-TMP: when] [ARG1: an order] is [V: completed] .
The system [V: shall] update the holding record when shares are bought or sold .
[ARG0: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: update] [ARG1: the holding record] [ARGM-TMP: when shares are bought or sold] .
The system shall update the [V: holding] [ARG0: record] when shares are bought or sold .
The system shall update the holding record when shares [V: are] bought or sold .
The system shall update the holding record [ARGM-TMP: when] [ARG1: shares] are [V: bought] or sold .
The system shall update the holding record [ARGM-TMP: when] [ARG1: shares] are bought or [V: sold] .
The system [V: shall] allow users to view users 's order history .
[ARG0: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: allow] [ARG1: users to view users 's order history] .
The system shall allow [ARG0: users] to [V: view] [ARG1: users 's order history] .
The system [V: shall] support both synchronous and asynchronous order processing .
[ARG0: The system] [ARGM-MOD: shall] [V: support] [ARG1: both synchronous and asynchronous order processing] .
